dcmURI.title: URI coercion-a atributa
dcmURI.description: Identifikuje Attribute Coercion putem Uniform Resource Identifier-a. Pogledajte vrednosti koje možete postaviti za Attribute Coercion URI polje u zavisnosti od coercion tipa.

dcmCoercionSufficient.title: Coercion atributa dovoljan
dcmCoercionSufficient.description: Ne primenjuj druge podudarne Attribute Coercions nižeg prioriteta, ako je ova Attribute Coercion efikasno primenjena.

dcmCoercionOnFailure.title: Coercion atributa pri neuspehu
dcmCoercionOnFailure.description: Ponašanje pri neuspehu primene ove Attribute Coercion. Pogledajte značenja Attribute Coercion on Failure.
enum: RETHROW|Propagates failure to operation which applied this (current) Attribute Coercion
CONTINUE|Continues applying other matching attribute coercions of lesser priority
SUFFICIENT|Does not apply other matching attribute coercions of lesser priority

dcmRulePriority.title: Prioritet coercion-a atributa
dcmRulePriority.description: Ako se stanje više archive attribute coercion (new) podudara za primljenu sliku, coercion višeg prioriteta ima prednost. Ako postoji više podudarnih coercion-a sa jednakim prioritetom, nedefinisano je koja coercion ima prednost.

dcmDIMSE.title: DIMSE
dcmDIMSE.description: DICOM Message Element na koji se ova Attribute Coercion primenjuje. Takođe primenjivo ako se zahtevi primaju preko web-a.
enum: N_CREATE_RQ|Applicable to MPPS N-CREATE request datasets
C_STORE_RQ|Applicable to objects stored / retrieved using C_STORE / C-MOVE / STOW / WADO-RS
C_FIND_RQ|Applicable to C-FIND / QIDO request datasets
C_FIND_RSP|Applicable to C-FIND / QIDO response datasets

dicomTransferRole.title: DICOM uloga prenosa
dicomTransferRole.description: DICOM uloga prenosa peer DICOM AE-a.

dcmSOPClass.title: SOP Class UID
dcmSOPClass.description: UID SOP klase za koju se ovaj coercion atributa primenjuje. Ako nedostaje, primenjuje se na bilo koju.

dcmProperty.title: Uslov
dcmProperty.description: Uslovi u formatu {key}[!]={value}. Pogledajte primenljivost, format i primere.

dcmAttributeUpdatePolicy.title: Politika ažuriranja atributa
dcmAttributeUpdatePolicy.description: Primenjena Attribute Update Policy. Efikasno samo za coerce from Leading C-FIND SCP coercion tip. Pogledajte značenja Attribute Update Policies.
enum: PRESERVE|The attributes will be preserved. Nullify attributes in the new dataset which are not present in the original dataset. Any extra attributes will be nullified
SUPPLEMENT|The attributes will be overwritten. Attributes not present in original dataset will be supplemented. Any extra attributes with not null values will be added
MERGE|The attributes will be overwritten. Attribute values will be written from new dataset. Any attributes with not null values, shall not be overwritten by attributes with null values

OVERWRITE|The attributes will be overwritten. Attribute values if null in new dataset, will be nullified in original dataset. Any attributes with not null values, shall be overwritten by attributes with null values

dcmSupplementFromDeviceReference.title: Parametar coercion-a imena uređaja
dcmSupplementFromDeviceReference.description: Device Name Coercion parametar. Efikasan samo za supplementing from device coercion tip.

dcmMergeAttribute.title: Parametri DICOM coercion-a atributa
dcmMergeAttribute.description: DICOM Attribute Coercion parametri u formatu {attributeID}={value}. {attributeID} unutar {value} se može zameniti vrednošću tog atributa u originalnom dataset-u. Efikasno samo za merging attributes coercion tip. Pogledajte DICOM Attribute Coercion Parameters za opcije formatiranja i primere.

dcmCoercionParam.title: Ostali parametri coercion-a
dcmCoercionParam.description: Pogledajte primenljivost na coercion tipove i primere u Other Attribute Coercion specifični parametri
